title: Playground Launch Index
concept: A local-development launcher organized around a command/search overlay and dense results pane, so power users can start PR previews, import GitHub projects, run blueprints, manage saved Playgrounds, edit files, inspect runtime state, and export work from one searchable index.
focus: saved Playground management for power users
dense results pane with contextual detail
Site Manager tools as searchable destinations
flows: Search or select commands to start Vanilla WordPress, WordPress PRs, Gutenberg PRs or branches, GitHub imports, Blueprint URLs, and .zip imports.
Save a temporary Playground to browser storage or a local directory with visible file-copy progress.
Browse saved and unsaved Playgrounds, then rename, delete, save, resume, or manage them.
Use searchable Site Manager destinations for settings, file browser, Blueprint editor, database tools, logs, and additional export actions.
Browse and filter all 43 blueprints while preserving featured shortcuts for Art Gallery, Coffee Shop, Feed Reader, Gaming News, Non-profit Organization, and Personal Blog.
Move work in or out through GitHub export, .zip download, .zip import, Blueprint bundle download, and database.sqlite download.
featureCoverage: create from Gutenberg PR or branch
import from GitHub after account connection
browse and filter Blueprint gallery entries
save temporary Playground in browser storage
navigate active WordPress paths with URL input
refresh the active embedded WordPress page
understand destructive reset and stored reload behavior
use File browser with create folder/file, upload, browse, and code editing affordances
